creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
On Sat, 25 Oct 2008 02:38:15 -0500, bf <bf2006a@yahoo.com> wrote:

> Jeremy:
>
> Don't forget the needed alteration to the pkg-plist for py-libxml2 that  
> was in one of my earlier messages: I didn't see it in the MC repo.

I already did py-libxml2, it was at the same time with libxml2.

http://www.marcuscom.com/pipermail/marcuscom-devel/2008-October/012300.html

> So now you know: if you want to update a port, but don't have the time or
> the desire to do it yourself, just mark it as vulnerable with  
> portaudit.  ;)

No need to, I have committed two patches to fix the security issues for  
2.6.x.

Cheers,
Mezz

> Regards,
>           b.
